name: Differential Payload Mass Identification via Joint Torques
description: An industrial robotics engineer must calibrate a robot arm's dynamic model to account for a new custom end-of-arm tooling in CoppeliaSim. Identify the payload mass by comparing holding torques of a pitching joint across at least 10 distinct static poses with varying horizontal reach, both with and without a programmatically created dynamically enabled payload. Export the collected data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/torque_data.csv (columns: config_id, ee_x, ee_y, ee_z, reach_m, baseline_torque, loaded_torque, delta_torque) and the mass estimation to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/payload_estimation.json (fields: total_configs, analyzed_joint_name, estimated_mass_kg, method_description). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
